name: MinusMigrator
title: Minus Migrator Framework
description: Ferramenta de migracao de banco de dados para Delphi: CLI + DLL + GUI. SchemaReader, SchemaDiffer, SQLGenerator para 8 bancos (Firebird, PostgreSQL, SQLite, MySQL, MariaDB, MSSQL, Oracle, DB2). Suporte a changelog JSON/YAML/XML, dry-run, lint/validation, diff entre bancos, rollback seletivo, CI/CD mode, preconditions, contexts, generate-models.
author: Gabriel Anomaly
